function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-02T18:21:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Need linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_10_06__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_03__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_01__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_17__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md
related_entities:
  - entity.nina
related_projects:
  - northstar_ledger
source_channel: 60_outbox/channels/northstar_email.md
---
Hi,

Attached are the oldest 4 invoices linked to Nina Schreiber in the Northstar Ledger lane:

- INV-0001 — issued 2025-10-06
- INV-0002 — issued 2025-11-03
- INV-0003 — issued 2025-12-01
- INV-0004 — issued 2026-01-17

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbound draft written successfully. Per inbox workflow, after fully completing one inbox request I should delete the inbox file.
Task completed: processed next inbox item, created outbound email draft with exact attachments, deleted inbox item. Now report completion with grounding refs limited to files actually read.

function.message: Processed the next inbound note by preparing a reply draft with the oldest four Nina Schreiber-linked Northstar Ledger invoices attached, then removed the inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree, root AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system with tree, read inbox-processing and email-sending workflows, used canonical entity/project/finance records to resolve the founder/product context, recorded outbound email in 60_outbox/outbox, and deleted the inbox item after completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox email requested the oldest four invoices linked to 'the founder I talk product with'. Canonical evidence showed Nina Schreiber is Miles's startup partner with product-focused context in 10_entities/cast/nina.md, and Northstar Ledger is the linked startup/product project in 40_projects/2026_03_04_northstar_ledger/README.MD. The four oldest invoice records linked to both Northstar Ledger and Nina Schreiber were the exact files for INV-0001 through INV-0004, which were attached in the outbound draft recorded at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md. The inbox file was then deleted per the inbox-processing workflow.
